description_long: This stool features a rounded, cylindrical form with two thick, stacked orange-cushioned sections making up the seat and body. The upholstery appears to be smooth faux leather or vinyl, giving it a sleek, modern look. The base is a solid, slightly narrower black cylinder, likely made of plastic or metal, providing stability and contrast to the vibrant seat. The stool lacks any visible legs, backrest, or footrest, emphasizing its minimalist, contemporary design. Its surface is gently curved and padded, suggesting comfort for sitting. The overall construction is robust and simple, suitable for public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or urban parks.
description: A modern, round orange-cushioned stool with a black cylindrical base and smooth, minimalist design. The seat is thickly padded and lacks legs, backrest, or footrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rounded orange seat and black base, with smooth, seamless upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, stacked cushion sections and the solid black base.
description_view_2: Rear angle view displaying the continuous curve of the seat and the uniformity of the upholstery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the stool's symmetry and clean lines.
